title: ITALY enforcement action against Dr. Paolo Montemurro (5,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on the medical professional Dr. Paolo Montemurro. The controller published several photographs showing the results of a rhinoseptoplasty procedure. As the patient did not consent to the publication of the pictures, the post has no sufficient legal...
